title: Mace 3D by Heycronus
description: This texture modifies the Minecraft Mace weapon, making it 3D and much more beautiful and modern compared to the original.
body:
![Mace 3D](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/404a60190cbccf383e007a3bca5899d0c0901c1b.png)

This texture modifies the Minecraft Mace weapon, making it 3D and much more beautiful and modern compared to the original.

Changes:
- 3D visuals in hand and GUI
- Improved texture

## Ajude Com qualquer Quantia ( Não Reenbolsável )
## [Livepix](https://livepix.gg/heycronus)
